communicatingRationale:
{"score":"0.00","tn":6,"rn":0,"breakdown":{"0xbb7500b713ccf4eff3f2dcb61e3c9d8db5ed5628a4b2f891656a0c0de98907bd":{"validRationale":false,"post":"https://forum.arbitrum.foundation/t/27395/34","voted":true,"updated":"automatically","proposalTopic":"https://forum.arbitrum.foundation/t/proposal-non-consitutional-top-up-for-hackathon-continuation-program/29064","createdAt":"2025-05-07T21:43:46.000Z","rationale":"Arbitrum Onboarding V2: A Governance Bootcamp  
 
   
      
     
     [NON-CONSTITUTIONAL] Arbitrum Onboarding V2: A Governance Bootcamp     Proposals   
   
   
    I am voting FOR this proposal on Tally. 
I believe this initiative offers a pathway for newcomers that want to get involved and contribute. I also think it is the right time for this, as growing our contributor base is essential for addressing our current challenges. 
I like that the structure of the program matches top performers with protocols that need governance help. I believe this bootcamp will help its participants gain skills to distinguish valuable contributions."},"0xd67d17db3bd230b163ce1f791d8712812446bced14ef2de875fd01ab3e2be3d6":{"validRationale":null,"post":null,"voted":true,"updated":"automatically","proposalTopic":"https://forum.arbitrum.foundation/t/step-2-committee-preferred-allocations/29086","createdAt":"2025-05-07T21:43:15.000Z"},"0x0b62de171fbff7a81833f9ebb44b9747189264d7a2cf95e3446223b1c413d2b0":{"validRationale":null,"post":null,"voted":true,"updated":"automatically","proposalTopic":"https://forum.arbitrum.foundation/t/defi-renaissance-incentive-program-drip/29049","createdAt":"2025-05-18T22:49:53.000Z"},"0x2d4089d72617eb137d6ee7ab9ae9efbe3cd1e0fcff48df24b926ce6259b734d3":{"validRationale":null,"post":null,"voted":true,"updated":"automatically","proposalTopic":"https://forum.arbitrum.foundation/t/constitutional-aip-constitutional-quorum-threshold-reduction/29145","createdAt":"2025-05-28T23:26:37.000Z"},"# The Watchdog: Arbitrum DAO’s Grant Mis":{"validRationale":null,"voted":true,"updated":"automatically","proposalTopic":null,"createdAt":"2025-05-21T16:46:34.000Z","post":null,"reason":null,"penalty":0},"# [CONSTITUTIONAL] AIP: ArbOS Version 40":{"validRationale":null,"voted":true,"updated":"automatically","proposalTopic":null,"createdAt":"2025-05-21T16:47:14.000Z","post":null,"reason":null,"penalty":0}}}

{"score":"0.00","tn":6,"rn":0,"breakdown":{"0xbb7500b713ccf4eff3f2dcb61e3c9d8db5ed5628a4b2f891656a0c0de98907bd":{"validRationale":false,"post":"https://forum.arbitrum.foundation/t/24476/130","voted":false,"updated":"automatically","proposalTopic":"https://forum.arbitrum.foundation/t/proposal-non-consitutional-top-up-for-hackathon-continuation-program/29064","createdAt":null,"rationale":"Voting   2025-03-22T16:00:00Z  
  [Tally]   
[NON-CONSTITUTIONAL] Arbitrum Audit Program  - Voted For  
 Maintain my reasons on snapshot. 
 This proposal aims to provide funding subsidies for early-stage projects that lack the funds to complete security audits. Smart contract auditing is crucial for blockchain projects, as multi-million-dollar exploits are all too common and alarming. So this is an incredibly meaningful initiative. As I have always emphasized, the continuous emergence of high-quality startups is fundamental to Arbitrum’s long-term growth. We should spare no effort in supporting these early-stage projects, especially those struggling with initial funding and market exposure. If Arbitrum DAO can remove the initial barriers for them, I think more great builders will be attracted to the Arbitrum ecosystem! 
 For these reasons, I fully support this proposal. 
  My reasons in snapshot"},"0xd67d17db3bd230b163ce1f791d8712812446bced14ef2de875fd01ab3e2be3d6":{"validRationale":false,"post":"https://forum.arbitrum.foundation/t/24476/131","voted":false,"updated":"automatically","proposalTopic":"https://forum.arbitrum.foundation/t/step-2-committee-preferred-allocations/29086","createdAt":null,"rationale":"Voting   2025-03-22T16:00:00Z
